title: Color by Board in MAP Dashboard

posts.author: Esteban (Esteban)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am making a simple Map widget in a dashbaord where I want to see the locations of Items from 2 different boards.
Is there a way to color the marker of those locations depending on which board they come from?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Esteban!

It isn’t currently possible to customise the colour of the marker I am afraid This is a great suggestion however, and one we can note with our team

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Esteban,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based the board they are coming from) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

Read more on our docs on what colums or data we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
